positive: A whimsical, stylized depiction of a crescent moon embracing a small cluster of abstract, geometric stars and ethereal nebulae. The design features strong, clean silhouettes with deep indigo, cosmic violet, and luminous gold accents. Composition should be perfectly centered and circular, allowing for easy framing on apparel. The style is modern celestial art, combining the smooth curves of Art Nouveau with the sharp, graphic elements of minimalist vector illustration. Crisp linework, high contrast, volumetric glow emanating from the stars, perfect for screen printing on fabric. Isolated on a clean white or transparent background.
